message:
Fix XSS vulnerabilities and add HTML export enhancements

Security fixes:
- encryption.rs: HTML-escape JSON in render_encrypted_placeholder
  to prevent XSS from malicious EncryptedContent data
- renderer.rs: HTML-escape format_timestamp output to prevent
  XSS from malformed timestamp strings

Enhancements (scripts.rs):
- Add Toast notification system for user feedback
- Add copyToClipboard with fallback for older browsers
- Add copy buttons to code blocks on hover
- Add print handler with section expansion
- Add Ctrl/Cmd+P keyboard shortcut for printing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
